## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests that fail if this behavior breaks
- [ ] Change is focused (no unrelated edits)
- [ ] If it affects measurement/cost output, I noted the impact (and any on-device check)
